meta.title: Weatherhaven | Redeployable Infrastructure & Shelter Systems
meta.description: World leader in redeployable infrastructure and camp solutions for military, medical, and commercial operations.

sections.body: Weatherhaven is a world leader in redeployable infrastructure, delivering turnkey shelter and camp solutions to military, medical, and commercial clients across all seven continents.

items.title: Workforce Housing
items.description: Remote camp accommodation for mining and energy.

sections.title: Mobile Healthcare
sections.description: Complete mobile medical infrastructure for humanitarian relief, military operations, and emergency response worldwide.

sections.heading: Why choose Weatherhaven as your redeployable infrastructure and camp provider?

items.title: First class solutions
items.description: We have the operational experience to deliver the right solution for your mission, on time and on budget.

items.title: Professionally engineered and manufactured in America and Europe
items.description: Our facilities in North America and Europe ensure quality manufacturing to the highest standards.

items.title: Delivery and installation across all 7 continents
items.description: For over 45 years we have deployed solutions worldwide, from polar research to desert military camps.

sections.title: TRECC
sections.description: Tactical Redeployable Expanding Container Capability — trailer-mounted, deployed in under 30 minutes.

featured.title: MECC-Based Additive Manufacturing Facility Delivered to US
featured.description: Weatherhaven delivers cutting-edge deployable manufacturing capability.

items.title: Jessica Au Appointed Weatherhaven Group CFO

sections.title: We're committed to finding the right solution for you
